head_commit.message:
Add Thailand THB scraping and Receiving Amount column

- Add run-thb.js: scrapes all 11 providers for KRW→THB 26,000
- Update scrape.yml: run Thailand scraper after Indonesia every hour
- Add Receiving Amount column to dashboard detail table with inline currency code (IDR, THB, etc.)
- Add CURRENCY_MAP helper for multi-country currency display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Vercel deployment: add vercel.json to prevent monorepo detection

scraper/package.json caused Vercel to mis-detect project structure.
Explicitly set framework=nextjs and root build commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
